scripts.dev: concurrently --names SIDECAR,WEB,ELECTRON -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:sidecar" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run dev --workspace apps/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop
scripts.package:full: npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
